titleStmt.title: SII 39.174: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 174. (A.R. No. 174 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARĀGHAVA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH AND EAST WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA •••••••••• ŚAKA 1563 (1641-42 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the partitioning of the total lands at Tirupukkuḻi into thirty-six shares for performing puja in the temple (karai) at the instance of Puṉyakōḍi-ayyaṉ who was the patron of Kumāra Tirumalai Tatāchārya of Eṭṭūr. Aḻagiya Poreṟṟeṉa Kumaraṉ-Paramānandan is mentioned as the accountant.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śubhamastu śrīmat vruṣavarṣam taiy mātam 9 § Eṭṭūr kumāratirumala tāttāccāri yāraiyaṉ Avarkaḷ śrī kāriyattukku kaṟttarāṉa puṉṟiyakoṭi Ayyaṉ Avarkaḷ Ūrnilam yil nātaṟkkum pa kuṟṟiyāka niṟka kaṭṭaḷaip paṉṟikaiyil tiruppati tiruppakuḻi mūṉṟu cervai patineṭṭutuy muppattāṟu
karaikkāṟāṉavaru maṉappūṟuvamāka cammatittu Ūrnilam Uṇṭāṉatellām Ācantāṟka kūṟiṭṭu muppattāṟukaraiyile pakuntu koṇṭom Avāḷavāḷ paṅkule santaniti mutalāṉa Aṣṭapokaṅkaḷum tāṉātikaḷum maṟṟu muṇṭāṉatum Ācantāṟkka kūṟāy puttirapavuttira
pāramparaiyāka naṭakka kaṭavomākavum Inta pakuṟṟikku yitile yātoruvar Acutti coṉṉāḷ Avāḷ kāṇiyāṭciyum yiḻantu Aparātam Āykkiṉaikku Uḷarāyi keṅkaik karaiyile kārāmpacuvai koṇṇa toṣattile pokakkaṭavāṉākavum yinta Ācantāṟkka pakuṟṟikūṟu suvāmi
vicaiyarākaye perumāḷ caṉṉati muṉ Apiṣeka maṇṭapāṟṟu koṟaṭṭule Eḻutinamaikku kaṇakku Aḻakiya poreṟṟiṉa kumāraṉ paramānantaṉ Eḻuttu Inta kalveṭṭu śakābdam 1000 5 100 6 10 3 ṉāmel cellāniṉṟa vruṣavaruṣam śubhamstu
Digital edition of SII 39.174 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
